texto: So love is like a test,but in what sense?To what end?Who was carrying out the test?But I think I did believe that Love had immense power to unearth all that was good in us,refine us and reveal to us the better versions of ourselves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ayobami Adebayo: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “So love is like a test,but in what sense?To what end?Who was carrying out the test?But I think I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love-quotes, sense pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
